# Stored File ID E2E Fixtures

Peer type: local Hermes A2A Bridge server with both stored-ID gates enabled.

These captures are local open-gate stored-ID evidence. They show that client, CLI, and tool paths can send only pre-staged `fileId` references and that the server returns safe `metadata.inputFileReferences`.

This is not public peer conformance evidence. It does not prove upload support, remote URL inbound support, inline byte support, path support, JSON-RPC, `/v1`, OAuth, public tunneling, signed Cards, or gRPC behavior.
